hook.headline: Turn DMs into dates

reply.text: So if I asked how flexible your weekend is what are we doing

messages.text: understandable, it saw me and tried to clock out early
inspector of what exactly, the seams or my patience
both, gotta test durability and emotional damage resistance
emotional damage is crazy from a man in my dms
you say that like it is new
yeah im projecting you walking out the store with that dress
you also projected your card declining or just vibes
my card approved the vision, bank texted "stay focused king"
your bank lying, that text said go home immediately
it said stop looking at her like rent is optional
rent been optional, delusion pays better anyway
i can't believe i'm doing this
